title: Opal Miner
description: Implements 5 new types of ores and tools
body:
With this mod you can mine Opal like a real Opal miner.

## WHAT'S INSIDE?
This mod offers 5 types of Opal Ores: Common Opal, Noble Opal, Fire Opal, Hyalite Opal and Black Opal.

These are found in desert type biomes (desert, badlands...)

Using a trim template and 8 Opal Gems you can craft 2 opal upgrades.

You can use these in a smithing table with a netherite tool or with a netherite armor piece to transform it into an opal one.

You can craft a Gem Trader Stall to transform a villager into a Gem Trader to whom you can sell and buy Opals

### SPECIAL ITEMS

There are 5 different rings, crafted using 3 gold ingots and one specific type of Opal: 

Common Opal Ring: gives speed effect when used

Noble Opal Ring: gives slow falling effect when used

Fire Opal Ring: gives fire resistance effect when used

Hyalite Opal Ring: gives jump boost effect when used

Black Opal Ring: gives strength and resistance effect when used

**Advice**

It's advised to install the Just Enough Item mod (https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or anything that shows the recipes of the mod.
